# The White Hart Hotel — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> The White Hart Hotel is a historic Grade II Listed coaching inn at 3 Fore Street, Holsworthy, Devon, EX22 6EB. Established in 1591 and run by the Hutchings family. Pub, restaurant, hotel, and events venue.

## About

The White Hart Hotel is one of the oldest pubs in Devon, with a continuous trading history dating back to 1591. Located in the centre of Holsworthy, North Devon, it is run by Jon and Tam Hutchings. The hotel has six boutique en-suite rooms, a traditional bar serving real ales and pub food, a premium Friday/Saturday evening restaurant called VINYL, and a weekly Sunday Carvery. The building is Grade II Listed.

## Key Facts

- **Address:** 3 Fore Street, Holsworthy, Devon, EX22 6EB
- **Phone:** +44 1409 253475
- **Email:** info@whiteharthotel.co.uk
- **Website:** https://whitehartholsworthy.co.uk
- **Founded:** 1591
- **Owners:** Jon and Tam Hutchings
- **Rooms:** 6 boutique en-suite hotel rooms
- **Check-in:** 2pm | Check-out:** 10:30am
- **Price range:** ££ (rooms from £58/night)
- **Pets:** Yes, dog-friendly throughout
- **Parking:** Free public parking on Bodmin Street, 2 minutes walk

## Opening Hours

- Monday–Thursday: 11am–11pm
- Friday–Saturday: 11am–midnight
- Sunday: 11am–10:30pm

## Dining

- **Bar food:** Daily, lunch and evening
- **Sunday Carvery:** Every Sunday from 12pm (book ahead)
- **VINYL restaurant:** Friday and Saturday from 6pm — stone-baked pizzas, Black Rock steaks, burgers, ribs, DJ sets from 8pm
- **Black Rock Grill:** Cook-your-own steak on volcanic rock heated to 300°C; locally sourced from Swannacott Manor Meats
- **Takeaway:** Via Just Eat or phone order for collection/delivery within 3 miles
- **Dietary options:** Vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free available on request

## Rooms

Six individually styled boutique rooms in a historic Grade II Listed coaching inn. All en-suite. Free WiFi. Tea and coffee-making facilities. Flat-screen TV. Dog-friendly rooms available. Best rates direct.

## Events & Entertainment

- **Poker:** LPPL Texas Hold'em every Tuesday, £10 buy-in
- **Black Rock Grill night:** Every Wednesday
- **Karaoke Party:** First Saturday of every month from 9pm
- **Pool table:** 70p/game in the downstairs bar
- **Function room:** Available for private hire (birthdays, wakes, corporate)

## Location & Access

Holsworthy is in North Devon, 17 miles east of Bude, 15 miles west of Okehampton, 30 minutes from Dartmoor. Free public parking adjacent. Ground floor wheelchair accessible. Accessible toilet on ground floor.

## Nearby Attractions

- Bude (North Cornwall coast): 17 miles west
- Dartmoor National Park: 30 minutes east (gateway at Okehampton)
- Lydford Gorge (National Trust): 14 miles
- Roadford Lake (Devon's largest inland lake): nearby
- Tarka Trail cycling route: accessible from Meeth
- South West Coast Path: accessible from Bude (17 miles)
